risk_reduction_summary: Recommended network reduces overload exposure at GG_METRO from 110% to under 85% peak utilization, and brings Jeju SLA violations from 42% down to a target 15% by activating GW_BULKY as a southern relay. Trade-off: service level drops slightly because optimization favors cost over speed in this scenario.
executive_summary: Switching from the as-is 3-hub network (S0) to the optimized 6-hub design (S3) saves ~$565K/year, with payback in 3 months. The added GW_BULKY and SJ_SECURE hubs absorb seasonal peaks and improve high-value goods security. Proxy-mode disclaimer: numbers reflect public OD data; pilot with enterprise shipment data is required before commit to capex.
